name: Shoko Relay
overview: A custom metadata provider and automation toolset for integrating Plex and AnimeThemes with Shoko Server.

releases.release_notes:
The version bump is due to some breaking server side changes that caused metadata refreshes to completely fail. The new method of VFS building should play much more nicely with Plex's autoscan as well.

**Changes:**
- Implement a new dual-pass caching strategy using FileInfo.Length and MD5 hashes to prevent unnecessary re-uploads of local artwork
- Verify local files against Shoko's native ResourceID (MD5) to make the cache self-healing against manual image deletions
- Upgrade the Plex thumbnail cache to store metadata as URL|MD5 to automatically detect and repair out-of-sync database states
- Update GetAvailableImages to sort AniDB images in reverse order for series-level entities (accounts for Shoko now retaining removed AniDB images)
- Eliminate the VFS Prune-and-Rebuild behavior to prevent Plex autoscan from registering false-positive file deletions during incremental rebuilds
- Implement a diff-and-sync strategy that evaluates the expected file layout and intelligently deletes only the unexpected files or broken symlinks
- Remove the pruneSeries flag entirely from VfsBuilder and VfsWatcher to rely purely on the diff-and-sync state tracking
- Improve VfsBuilder robustness to gracefully identify and prune VFS folders when a series is completely deleted from the Shoko database
- Remove naive AnimeThemes CSV parsing and file prediction from VfsBuilder to respect separation of concerns
- Update the Diff-And-Sync cleanup phase to dynamically detect and preserve symlinks pointing to the AnimeThemes repository
- Ensure dynamically preserved AnimeThemes files are still registered to the onLink callback for VFS Browser blueprint visibility
- Add GET /plex/metadata/refresh endpoint to PlexController to manually trigger Plex metadata refreshes for specified series IDs
- Save volume level and mute status to localStorage whenever they are changed in the standalone player
- Bump Shoko.Abstractions to v6.0.0-alpha.65

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/natyusha/ShokoRelay/compare/v0.14.1...v0.15.0

**Changes:**
- Introduce a new TMDB Image Language setting to control priority for metadata image selection
- Update dashboard help text to clarify the usage of X-MAIN and NONE language codes
- Add an optional '/options/{overrides}' route segment to MetadataController to allow custom Provider Settings on a per-library basis in Plex
- Implement GetEffectiveSettings in ConfigProvider to intercept HTTP requests and dynamically apply configuration overrides via reflection
- Parse path segments using semicolons as the primary delimiter to ensure support for comma-separated language priority lists
- Cache the cloned effective configuration within HttpContext.Items to ensure zero performance impact during active requests
- Remove the ?t=cachebuster appendage from Shoko image URLs now that Shoko Server utilizes immutable UUIDs for images
- Add SemaphoreSlim to ImageSyncService to prevent race conditions when updating the local cache file concurrently
- Wrap scheduled Plex background tasks in ShokoRelay.cs with SyncLock to prevent them from executing concurrently with manually requested tasks
-  Update Readme/Controller.md with the new changes
- Bump Shoko.Abstractions to v6.0.0-alpha.64

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/natyusha/ShokoRelay/compare/v0.14.0...v0.14.1

**Changes:**
- Switch from Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Versioning.ApiExplorer v5.1.0 to Asp.Versioning.Mvc.ApiExplorer v10.0.0 to account for Shoko Server changes
- Add Asp.Versioning using directives to all controllers to resolve [ApiVersion] attribute namespace changes
- Update PurgeUnusedReleases call in ShokoImportService to reflect new signature in Shoko.Abstractions
- Properly dispose CancellationTokenSource instances in VfsWatcher
- Optimize dynamic CSS generation in DashboardController by replacing StringBuilder with raw string literals
- Restrict automation interval, UTC offset, and series ID filter inputs to  acceptable values on the dashboard
- Replace duplicate animethemes section icons with more appropriates ones and add a small animethemes logo badge to them
- Bump Shoko.Abstractions to v6.0.0-alpha.61

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/natyusha/ShokoRelay/compare/v0.13.8...v0.14.0
